name: claudeception
description: Continuous-learning meta-skill: identifies skill gaps in the current session's work and creates new skills to fill them. Adapted from blader/Claudeception (MIT) with marketplace-plugin packaging and dmaynor-skills-marketplace conventions. Use when: (1) you just developed a methodology that should outlive the current session, (2) you want to /claudeception at end of session to extract skills retrospectively, (3) you found a non-obvious solution that future you will need again, (4) you want to detect overlap with existing skills before creating a new one. Pairs with skill-improver (which refines existing skills).
